field_values.action_summary: The protagonist regains consciousness in a Warhoon camp. He is treated by an ancient, ugly female healer before being strapped to a wild thoat for transport to the main column.
field_values.camera_intent: Extreme close-ups of eyes and wounds; Medium shots of healer's grotesque features; Wide shots of harsh Martian landscape
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Wound placement and severity on naked protagonist
Binding/strap tension and configuration to the thoat
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH018_SC001

## Production Intent
Establish the protagonist's physical vulnerability through nudity and injury while emphasizing the grotesque, alien nature of the Warhoon captors via close-up textures.

## Required Cast
- protagonist (naked, wounded)
- female_healer (ancient, grotesque)
- Warhoon Warriors (background)

## Required Environments
- warhoon_camp_interior (dim, small room)
- martian_plains_march_route (vast, harsh exterior)

## Continuity Constraints
- Wound placement and severity on naked protagonist
- Binding/strap tension and configuration to the thoat

## Beat List
- BT001: Awakening and disorientation
- BT002: Grotesque medical treatment
- BT003: Securing for transport
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
